question: What is the admission process?
answer: Admission process is simple. You can either visit the college campus and select the course you are interested in, pay the fee, and enroll directly. Or you can take admission through counseling.
question_hi: Admission process kya hai?
answer_hi: Admission process bahut simple hai. Aap college campus mein jaakar apni pasand ka course choose kar sakte hain, fee jama karke seedha admission le sakte hain. Ya phir aap counseling ke through bhi admission le sakte hain.

question: How do I take admission by visiting college?
answer: Visit the college, select your desired course, pay the fee for that course, and complete your enrollment.
question_hi: College jaakar admission kaise lein?
answer_hi: College jaayen, apna pasandida course chunen, us course ki fee jama karen, aur apna admission complete karen.

question: What courses are offered by the college?
answer: The college offers B.Tech (CSE, CSE-AI&ML, CSE-Data Science, Mechanical, Civil, Electronics & Communication, Electronics-VLSI, Electronics-Advanced Communication), B.Tech Lateral Entry, M.Tech (CSE), Polytechnic Diploma (CSE, Electrical, Civil, Mechanical), BBA, MBA, BCA, and MCA.
question_hi: College mein kaun kaun se courses available hain?
answer_hi: College mein B.Tech (CSE, CSE-AI&ML, CSE-Data Science, Mechanical, Civil, Electronics & Communication, Electronics-VLSI, Electronics-Advanced Communication), B.Tech Lateral Entry, M.Tech (CSE), Polytechnic Diploma (CSE, Electrical, Civil, Mechanical), BBA, MBA, BCA, aur MCA courses available hain.

question: What is the fee for BCA?
answer: BCA fee is approximately 50,000 rupees plus 3,500 rupees examination fee.
question_hi: BCA ki fee kitni hai?
answer_hi: BCA ki fee lagbhag 50,000 rupaye plus 3,500 rupaye exam fee hai.

question: What is the fee for BBA?
answer: BBA fee is approximately 50,000 rupees plus 3,500 rupees examination fee.
question_hi: BBA ki fee kitni hai?
answer_hi: BBA ki fee lagbhag 50,000 rupaye plus 3,500 rupaye exam fee hai.

question: What is the fee for B.Tech?
answer: B.Tech fee is approximately 80,000 to 85,000 rupees plus 5,000 to 6,000 rupees examination fee.
question_hi: B.Tech ki fee kitni hai?
answer_hi: B.Tech ki fee lagbhag 80,000 se 85,000 rupaye plus 5,000 se 6,000 rupaye exam fee hai.

question: What is the fee for B.Pharma?
answer: B.Pharma fee is approximately 1,10,000 rupees plus 5,000 rupees examination fee.
question_hi: B.Pharma ki fee kitni hai?
answer_hi: B.Pharma ki fee lagbhag 1,10,000 rupaye plus 5,000 rupaye exam fee hai.

question: What is the fee for D.Pharma?
answer: D.Pharma fee is approximately 80,000 rupees.
question_hi: D.Pharma ki fee kitni hai?
answer_hi: D.Pharma ki fee lagbhag 80,000 rupaye hai.

question: What is the college timing?
answer: College timing is from 9:10 AM to 4:20 PM.
question_hi: College ka timing kya hai?
answer_hi: College ka timing subah 9:10 baje se shaam 4:20 baje tak hai.

question: Is hostel facility available?
answer: Yes, hostel facility is available. Non-AC hostel fee is approximately 65,000 rupees and AC hostel fee is approximately 75,000 rupees.
question_hi: Kya hostel facility available hai?
answer_hi: Haan, hostel facility available hai. Non-AC hostel ki fee lagbhag 65,000 rupaye aur AC hostel ki fee lagbhag 75,000 rupaye hai.

question: What is the hostel fee?
answer: Non-AC hostel fee is around 65,000 rupees per year, and AC hostel fee is around 75,000 rupees per year.
question_hi: Hostel ki fee kitni hai?
answer_hi: Non-AC hostel ki fee lagbhag 65,000 rupaye per year, aur AC hostel ki fee lagbhag 75,000 rupaye per year hai.

question: Where is the college located?
answer: The college, Institute of Technology and Management, is located at AL-1, Sector-7, GIDA, Gorakhpur, Uttar Pradesh, 273029, on the Gorakhpur-Lucknow National Highway, about 12 km from Gorakhpur city.
question_hi: College kahan located hai?
answer_hi: College, Institute of Technology and Management, AL-1, Sector-7, GIDA, Gorakhpur, Uttar Pradesh, 273029 mein, Gorakhpur-Lucknow National Highway par located hai, jo Gorakhpur city se lagbhag 12 km door hai.

question: What is the full name of the college?
answer: Institute of Technology and Management (ITM), GIDA, Gorakhpur.
question_hi: College ka full name kya hai?
answer_hi: Institute of Technology and Management (ITM), GIDA, Gorakhpur.

question: When was the college established?
answer: The Institute of Technology and Management was established in July 2001 under the patronage of Shree Krishna Educational Society.
question_hi: College ki sthapna kab hui thi?
answer_hi: Institute of Technology and Management ki sthapna July 2001 mein Shree Krishna Educational Society ke patronage mein hui thi.

question: Does the college offer MCA?
answer: Yes, the college offers MCA (Master of Computer Applications), a 2 year program.
question_hi: Kya college mein MCA hai?
answer_hi: Haan, college mein MCA (Master of Computer Applications), ek 2 saal ka program available hai.

question: Does the college offer MBA?
answer: Yes, the college offers MBA (Master of Business Administration) with specializations in HR, Marketing, Finance, IT, Logistics and Supply Chain Management, Operations Management, and Rural Development and Management. It is a 2 year program.
question_hi: Kya college mein MBA hai?
answer_hi: Haan, college mein MBA (Master of Business Administration) HR, Marketing, Finance, IT, Logistics and Supply Chain Management, Operations Management, aur Rural Development and Management specializations ke saath available hai. Ye 2 saal ka program hai.

question: What is the duration of BCA course?
answer: BCA (Bachelor of Computer Applications) is a 3 year program.
question_hi: BCA course ki duration kitni hai?
answer_hi: BCA (Bachelor of Computer Applications) 3 saal ka program hai.

question: What is the duration of BBA course?
answer: BBA (Bachelor of Business Administration) is a 3 year program.
question_hi: BBA course ki duration kitni hai?
answer_hi: BBA (Bachelor of Business Administration) 3 saal ka program hai.

question: What is the duration of B.Tech course?
answer: B.Tech is a 4 year program. B.Tech Lateral Entry (for diploma or B.Sc. holders directly into 2nd year) is a 3 year program.
question_hi: B.Tech course ki duration kitni hai?
answer_hi: B.Tech 4 saal ka program hai. B.Tech Lateral Entry (diploma ya B.Sc. holders ke liye seedha 2nd year mein) 3 saal ka program hai.

question: Does the college offer M.Tech?
answer: Yes, the college offers M.Tech in Computer Science & Engineering, a 2 year program.
question_hi: Kya college mein M.Tech hai?
answer_hi: Haan, college mein Computer Science & Engineering mein M.Tech, ek 2 saal ka program available hai.

question: What branches are available in B.Tech?
answer: B.Tech branches include Computer Science & Engineering, CSE (AI & ML), CSE (Data Science), Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electronics Engineering (VLSI Design & Technology), and Electronics Engineering (Advanced Communication Technology).
question_hi: B.Tech mein kaun kaun si branches available hain?
answer_hi: B.Tech ki branches mein Computer Science & Engineering, CSE (AI & ML), CSE (Data Science), Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electronics Engineering (VLSI Design & Technology), aur Electronics Engineering (Advanced Communication Technology) shamil hain.

question: Does the college offer Polytechnic diploma courses?
answer: Yes, Polytechnic diploma courses are offered in Computer Science & Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Civil Engineering, and Mechanical Engineering (Production), each of 3 years duration.
question_hi: Kya college mein Polytechnic diploma courses hain?
answer_hi: Haan, Polytechnic diploma courses Computer Science & Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Civil Engineering, aur Mechanical Engineering (Production) mein available hain, har ek ki duration 3 saal hai.

question: What is the eligibility for B.Tech admission?
answer: Candidates must have passed Intermediate (12th) with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects, obtaining at least 45% marks (40% for reserved category candidates) in these subjects together.
question_hi: B.Tech admission ke liye eligibility kya hai?
answer_hi: Candidate ko Physics aur Mathematics compulsory subjects ke saath Intermediate (12th) pass hona chahiye, in subjects mein kam se kam 45% marks (reserved category ke liye 40%) hone chahiye.

question: What is the eligibility for BCA admission?
answer: Candidates who have passed Intermediate (12th) or an equivalent examination with a minimum of 40% marks are eligible for BCA.
question_hi: BCA admission ke liye eligibility kya hai?
answer_hi: Intermediate (12th) ya equivalent exam kam se kam 40% marks ke saath pass karne wale candidates BCA ke liye eligible hain.

question: What is the eligibility for BBA admission?
answer: Candidates who have passed Intermediate (12th) or an equivalent examination with a minimum of 40% marks are eligible for BBA.
question_hi: BBA admission ke liye eligibility kya hai?
answer_hi: Intermediate (12th) ya equivalent exam kam se kam 40% marks ke saath pass karne wale candidates BBA ke liye eligible hain.

question: What is the eligibility for MBA admission?
answer: Candidates must have passed a three year Bachelor's degree from a recognized Indian University with a minimum of 50% marks (45% for SC/ST candidates).
question_hi: MBA admission ke liye eligibility kya hai?
answer_hi: Candidate ke paas kisi recognized Indian University se three year Bachelor's degree kam se kam 50% marks ke saath (SC/ST candidates ke liye 45%) honi chahiye.

question: What is the eligibility for MCA admission?
answer: Candidates must have passed any graduation degree (B.E./B.Tech/B.Sc/B.Com/B.A/BCA etc.), preferably with Mathematics at 10+2 or graduation level, with at least 50% marks (45% for reserved category).
question_hi: MCA admission ke liye eligibility kya hai?
answer_hi: Candidate ke paas koi bhi graduation degree (B.E./B.Tech/B.Sc/B.Com/B.A/BCA etc.) honi chahiye, preferably 10+2 ya graduation level par Mathematics ke saath, kam se kam 50% marks ke saath (reserved category ke liye 45%).

question: What is Polytechnic course fee?
answer: Exact Polytechnic fee is not confirmed yet. Please contact the college office for updated fee details.
question_hi: Polytechnic course ki fee kya hai?
answer_hi: Polytechnic ki exact fee abhi confirm nahi hai. Updated fee details ke liye please college office se contact karen.

question: How can I contact the college?
answer: You can contact the college at +91-8081209500, or email director@itmgkp.edu.in. The college is located at AL-1, Sector-7, GIDA, Gorakhpur-273029.
question_hi: College se contact kaise karen?
answer_hi: Aap college se +91-8081209500 par ya director@itmgkp.edu.in par email karke contact kar sakte hain. College AL-1, Sector-7, GIDA, Gorakhpur-273029 mein located hai.

question: What is the college phone number?
answer: The college contact number is +91-8081209500.
question_hi: College ka phone number kya hai?
answer_hi: College ka contact number +91-8081209500 hai.

question: What is the college email address?
answer: You can email the college at director@itmgkp.edu.in or director.itm@gmail.com.
question_hi: College ka email address kya hai?
answer_hi: Aap college ko director@itmgkp.edu.in ya director.itm@gmail.com par email kar sakte hain.

question: What documents are required for admission?
answer: Required documents include 5 colored passport size photographs, original 10th class certificate, original 12th class marksheet, photocopies of 10th and 12th certificates, UPSEE seat allotment letter, caste certificate (for SC/ST/OBC), UPSEE rank letter (for direct admission if applicable), domicile certificate, and income certificate.
question_hi: Admission ke liye kaun se documents chahiye?
answer_hi: Required documents mein 5 colored passport size photos, original 10th class certificate, original 12th class marksheet, 10th aur 12th certificates ki photocopies, UPSEE seat allotment letter, caste certificate (SC/ST/OBC ke liye), UPSEE rank letter (agar applicable ho), domicile certificate, aur income certificate shamil hain.

question: Is there a scholarship facility?
answer: Please contact the college administration office at +91-8081209500 for information about scholarships and financial aid.
question_hi: Kya scholarship facility hai?
answer_hi: Scholarship aur financial aid ki information ke liye please college administration office se +91-8081209500 par contact karen.

question: What is the exam pattern?
answer: Exam pattern details vary by course and are set according to AKTU (for degree courses) or BTE (for Polytechnic). Please check with your department or the examination office for specifics.
question_hi: Exam pattern kya hai?
answer_hi: Exam pattern course ke hisaab se alag hota hai aur AKTU (degree courses ke liye) ya BTE (Polytechnic ke liye) ke according set kiya jaata hai. Specific details ke liye apne department ya examination office se check karen.

question: What is the attendance requirement?
answer: Students must attend all lectures, tutorials, practicals and other prescribed activities. Attendance shortfall can be condoned up to 25% on medical or genuine grounds, with a further relaxation of up to 15% possible with the Head of Institution's approval. Students not meeting the overall attendance requirement may not be allowed to appear in end semester exams.
question_hi: Attendance requirement kya hai?
answer_hi: Students ko sabhi lectures, tutorials, practicals aur other prescribed activities mein attend karna zaroori hai. Attendance shortfall medical ya genuine grounds par 25% tak condone ho sakti hai, aur Head of Institution ki approval se 15% tak further relaxation possible hai. Overall attendance requirement pura na karne wale students ko end semester exams mein baithne ki permission nahi mil sakti.

question: Is there a canteen in the college?
answer: Yes, the college has a canteen facility on campus.
question_hi: Kya college mein canteen hai?
answer_hi: Haan, college mein campus ke andar canteen facility hai.

question: Is there a transport facility?
answer: Yes, the college provides a transport facility for students.
question_hi: Kya college mein transport facility hai?
answer_hi: Haan, college students ke liye transport facility provide karta hai.

question: Is internet facility available in college?
answer: Yes, the college provides 24x7 internet facility on campus.
question_hi: Kya college mein internet facility hai?
answer_hi: Haan, college campus mein 24x7 internet facility provide karta hai.

question: Does the college have a library?
answer: Yes, the college has a library facility for students. Details are available under the Academics section of the college website.
question_hi: Kya college mein library hai?
answer_hi: Haan, college mein students ke liye library facility hai. Details college website ke Academics section mein available hain.

question: Does the college help with placements?
answer: Yes, the college has a Corporate Relations and Placements cell that works with recruiting companies to help place students.
question_hi: Kya college placements mein help karta hai?
answer_hi: Haan, college mein Corporate Relations and Placements cell hai jo recruiting companies ke saath milkar students ko placement dilane mein help karta hai.

question: What is ragging policy of the college?
answer: Ragging is strictly banned in the institution. Anyone found indulging in ragging can face punishment including expulsion, suspension, fine, withholding of scholarships or results, or debarment from events.
question_hi: College ki ragging policy kya hai?
answer_hi: Institution mein ragging strictly banned hai. Ragging mein involved paaye jaane wale kisi bhi vyakti ko expulsion, suspension, fine, scholarship ya result rokna, ya events se debar karne jaisi punishment mil sakti hai.

question: Which university is the college affiliated to?
answer: Engineering, Management (BBA/MBA), and Computer Application (BCA/MCA) programs are affiliated to AKTU (Dr. A.P.J. Abdul Kalam Technical University), Lucknow. Polytechnic programs are affiliated to BTE (Board of Technical Education).
question_hi: College kis university se affiliated hai?
answer_hi: Engineering, Management (BBA/MBA), aur Computer Application (BCA/MCA) programs AKTU (Dr. A.P.J. Abdul Kalam Technical University), Lucknow se affiliated hain. Polytechnic programs BTE (Board of Technical Education) se affiliated hain.

question: Is the college AICTE approved?
answer: Yes, the Engineering, Management, Computer Application, and Polytechnic programs are approved by AICTE (All India Council for Technical Education).
question_hi: Kya college AICTE approved hai?
answer_hi: Haan, Engineering, Management, Computer Application, aur Polytechnic programs AICTE (All India Council for Technical Education) se approved hain.

question: How can I register online for admission?
answer: You can fill out the online registration form available on the college website's admission section to begin the registration process.
question_hi: Main admission ke liye online register kaise karu?
answer_hi: Aap registration process start karne ke liye college website ke admission section mein available online registration form fill kar sakte hain.
